titles.text: 0 kara no Shougi: Shougi Youchien - Ayumi-gumi
0からの将棋将棋幼稚園あゆみ組

descriptions.text: This is a shogi game that features 5 different kind of boards, a complete tutorial and a dictionary in Japanese language, different vs modes (also a 2 player vs mode), a sort of a battle mode in which the player advance defeating opponents and the game has 10 different opponents.
